epoch.note: Record restarted 2026-07-07 when the freshness + high-probability gates went live: only setups passing the same gate as the public board (fresh multi-timeframe reversal with a live trigger, or a golden archetype) are stamped, decided before the outcome. The prior ungated chain (214W–214L at ±10%, i.e. no edge — it measured the pre-gate scanner, not the strategy) is archived and remains hash-verifiable.
